name: Golden Gear Automotive
tagline: Family-owned auto repair in Sebastopol — ASE Blue Seal Certified, all makes and models.
seoDescription: Golden Gear Automotive is a family-owned, ASE Blue Seal Certified auto repair shop in Sebastopol, CA, servicing all makes and models — from everyday drivers to luxury imports.

sections.heading: Honest auto repair across Sebastopol, CA
sections.subheading: Family-owned and operated in Sebastopol — ASE Blue Seal Certified technicians servicing all makes and models, from everyday drivers to luxury imports.

sections.heading: About Golden Gear Automotive
body: At Golden Gear Automotive — our family-owned and operated Sebastopol auto repair shop — we pride ourselves on servicing a diverse range of vehicles, making sure every customer’s car gets the expert attention it deserves.

From everyday drivers to luxury imports and high-performance vehicles, our ASE Blue Seal Certified technicians have the skills and tools to work on all makes and models. Whether you drive a Toyota, Honda, or Ford, we deliver reliable repairs and maintenance tailored to your vehicle.

items.title: Repairs for all makes & models
items.description: From domestic daily drivers to luxury imports and high-performance vehicles, our ASE Blue Seal Certified technicians handle it.

items.title: Honest diagnostics
items.description: We track down the real problem and explain it in plain terms before any work begins.

items.title: Routine maintenance
items.description: Oil, brakes, fluids, and scheduled service to keep your vehicle reliable mile after mile.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Golden Gear Automotive and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.
